title: The Wizard's Gambit
subtitle: A tale of wishes, the Amnesiac's cost, and the Evil Saint.

phases.title: Pre-Game: The Grimoire Is Set
phases.subtitle: Six players and the Storyteller gather.

events.label: Setup
events.body: Bee is the Ojo, the starting Demon. Twob is the Lunatic. Koruto is the Amnesiac, Commando the Alchemist with a Wizard ability, Bumblebee the Wizard, and beep boop the Fisherman. Starlow runs the game as Storyteller. The grimoire is set; the first night approaches.

phases.title: Night 1: Wishes and the Cost
phases.subtitle: The Wizard wishes; the Amnesiac chooses the price.

events.label: Wizard wish
events.body: Bumblebee, the Wizard, wishes: "Each night, a different good player might swap alignments & characters with the Demon."

events.label: Amnesiac cost
events.body: Koruto is prompted to use their ability and does so. When asked to choose the cost of the Wizard's wish, Koruto says: "Every day, someone different and unique role is revealed by the Story Teller which is actually true."

events.label: Role change
events.body: Bee and twob swapped characters on Night 1 due to Bumblebee's wish. Bee is now the Lunatic and Twob is the Ojo.

events.result: Wish granted: each night, a different good player might swap alignments and characters with the Demon.
Cost of the Wizard wish: every day, the Storyteller reveals a different unique role that is actually true.

events.reason: Swapped characters with twob due to Wizard wish
Swapped characters with Bee due to Wizard wish

phases.title: Day 1: Revelation and Execution
phases.subtitle: The Amnesiac is revealed; the town votes.

events.label: Revelation
events.body: Day breaks. The Storyteller announces that Koruto is the Amnesiac. A nomination is made against Koruto.

events.label: Nomination & Execution
events.body: Twob nominates Bumblebee. The town votes. Bumblebee is executed.

phases.title: Night 2: The Evil Saint Rises
phases.subtitle: The Ojo chooses; the Alchemist's wish reshapes the game.

events.label: Ojo kills
events.body: The Ojo (Twob) chooses the Lunatic. Bee dies in the night.

events.label: Alchemist Wizard wish
events.body: Commando, as Alchemist with the Wizard ability, wishes: "Starlow becomes the evil Saint." Starlow, the Storyteller, is given the character of the Evil Saint and enters the game.

events.result: Ojo chose the Lunatic. Bee dies.
Wish: Starlow becomes the Evil Saint and enters the game as a player.

phases.title: Day 2: The Atheist Gambit
phases.subtitle: The cost of wishes comes due; the Storyteller falls.

events.label: Revealed role
events.body: Under the cost of Koruto's wish, the Storyteller reveals today's true role: Starlow is the Saint.

events.label: Fisherman consult
events.body: Beep asks for a consult on his Fisherman ability. He receives: "Keep claiming Atheist, and really try to sell that you are indeed the Atheist."

events.result: Keep claiming Atheist, and really try to sell that you are indeed the Atheist.

events.label: Atheist claim
events.body: Beep boop keeps claiming it's an Atheist game and sells the claim hard.

events.label: Nomination & Execution
events.body: Commando agrees and in hurry nominates Starlow. The town votes. Starlow is executed and marked dead as the Saint.

events.reason: Executed as the Saint in what the town believed was an Atheist game
Saint executed — but the wish was made while Commando was drunk, so no real Saint existed

events.label: Final grimoire
events.body: The Storyteller reveals the final grimoire state, showing the true roles and the twist of the drunk Alchemist whose wish created a false Saint.

events.label: The twist revealed
events.body: The cost of Commando's Wizard wish is revealed: 'If you nominate the Storyteller, you become drunk.' By nominating Starlow, Commando became drunk. Since Commando was drunk when making the wish, there was never a real Saint—the Atheist gambit fails.

events.label: Evil wins
events.body: With the Storyteller executed in what the town believed was an Atheist game, but with no Saint to trigger the good win condition, the game ends. Evil wins!
